thermal.title: Thermal Risks
thermal.description: Overheating issues detected at prototype stage lead to product delays and cost increases. We minimize these risks through thermal analysis at the design stage.

mechanical.title: Mechanical Integration
mechanical.description: Incompatibilities between PCBs, sensors, and mechanical components cause production line stoppages. We guarantee compatibility through 3D integration and cable routing work.

manufacturing.title: Manufacturability
manufacturing.description: Design incompatibility with manufacturing processes means mold changes and additional costs. We increase production efficiency with DFM-compliant designs.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Expert support at every stage of electronic product development

enclosure.title: Enclosure Design
enclosure.whatWeDoText: We design manufacturable and durable enclosure solutions that balance your industrial design requirements with technical constraints. Considering IP protection classes, EMC requirements, and ergonomic factors, we combine aesthetics and functionality.
problemsList: Failure to meet IP protection class requirements
enclosure.approachText: Following DFM (Design for Manufacturing) principles, we develop designs suitable for manufacturing methods such as injection molding, CNC machining, and sheet metal processing. In material selection, we balance durability, cost, and manufacturing ease.
enclosure.whenToInvolveText: Reach out when your product concept is clear and industrial design work has begun. Early involvement minimizes design revisions.

thermal.title: Thermal Analysis & Cooling
thermal.whatWeDoText: We analyze the thermal performance of your electronic products through CFD (Computational Fluid Dynamics) simulations, identify overheating risks, and design cooling solutions. We evaluate different cooling strategies such as natural convection, forced convection, and heat pipes.
problemsList: Incorrect use of thermal interface materials
thermal.approachText: By performing thermal analysis through CFD simulations at the design stage, we predict temperature distributions of critical components. We determine cooling requirements and select the most suitable cooling strategy. We validate simulation results with prototype tests.
thermal.whenToInvolveText: Start thermal analysis work when PCB placement and power consumption estimates are clear. Early analysis prevents thermal issues from being resolved with costly solutions.

integration.title: Mechanical Integration & 3D Cable Routing
integration.whatWeDoText: We perform 3D integration of PCBs, sensors, cabling, and mechanical components. We design cable routing and connection solutions to ensure assembly ease and reliability. We optimize cable placements for EMC compliance.
integration.approachText: By evaluating PCB placement data and mechanical constraints together, we create 3D integration models. We design special channels and connection points for cable routing. We consider assembly sequence and access requirements.
integration.whenToInvolveText: Start integration work while PCB design and mechanical enclosure design progress in parallel. Early coordination reduces revision costs.

prototyping.title: Rapid Prototyping & Manufacturing Support
prototyping.whatWeDoText: We perform rapid prototype production with 3D printing and CNC machining. We validate designs through prototype tests. We provide production readiness documentation and supplier coordination for transition to mass production.
prototyping.approachText: We accelerate design iterations by using rapid prototyping methods. We perform functional and mechanical validation through prototype tests. We facilitate transition to production by preparing necessary documentation for mass production.
prototyping.whenToInvolveText: Start prototype production at the design validation stage. Early prototyping enables early detection of design errors.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Expertise in mechanical and thermal design for electronic product development processes

story.title: Our Story
story.text: SENTAS Engineering is an engineering firm specialized in mechanical integration and thermal design for electronic product development processes. We believe that problems identified and solved at the design stage prevent costly post-production revisions. Therefore, we accelerate our clients' product development processes and optimize their costs through early involvement and systematic approach.

technicalDepth.title: Technical Depth
technicalDepth.description: We solve technical problems with deep expertise in CFD, FEA, and CAD tools.

practicalExperience.title: Practical Experience
practicalExperience.description: We have practical experience in real manufacturing processes and supplier coordination.

systematicApproach.title: Systematic Approach
systematicApproach.description: We apply standard processes and quality controls in every project.

transparentCommunication.title: Transparent Communication
transparentCommunication.description: We provide regular and open communication about project progress and decisions.

q1.question: How long does a project take?
q1.answer: Project duration depends on the scope and complexity of the project. Simple enclosure designs take 2-4 weeks, thermal analysis projects take 3-6 weeks, and complex integration projects can take 6-12 weeks.

q2.question: Which CAD formats do you use?
q2.answer: We use common CAD software such as SolidWorks, CATIA, Creo, and Fusion 360. Delivery formats include STEP, IGES, and native CAD formats.

q3.question: Do you produce prototypes?
q3.answer: Yes, we produce prototypes with 3D printing and CNC machining. We also provide mass production support through our supplier network.

q4.question: Can you work remotely?
q4.answer: Yes, we conduct a large portion of our projects remotely. We can travel for on-site meetings and tests when necessary.
